---
title: "Assessing Propaganda Effectiveness in North Korea: A Limited Access Case Study"
date: 2020-01
author:
  - name: Efe Sevin
    url: https://linktr.ee/efesevin
    orcid: 0000-0002-7837-5000
    affiliation: Towson University
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
  - name: Won Yong Jang
    url: https://www.uwec.edu/profiles/jangwy/
    orcid: 0000
    affiliation: University of Wisconsin-Eau Claire
  - name: Hyelim Lee
    url: https://scholar.google.co.kr/citations?user=GnvwjTUAAAAJ&hl=en
    orcid: 0000
    affiliation: University of Oklahoma
categories: [Korea, inter-Korean, propaganda, 2020]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    Efe Sevin*, <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan</strong>, Won Yong Jang, and Hyelim Lee (2020), “Assessing Propaganda Effectiveness in North Korea: A Limited Access Case Study,” in Nicholas O’Shaughnessy, Paul Baines and Nancy Snow (eds.) <em>The SAGE Handbook of Propaganda</em> (pp. 205-222), Sage, doi: <a href="https://dx.doi.org/10.4135/9781526477170"><code>10.4135/9781526477170</code></a>
doi: 10.4135/9781526477170
#draft: true
---

## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@incollection{sevin_assessing_2019,
	location = {Thousand Oaks, {CA}},
	title = {Assessing Propaganda Effectiveness in North Korea: A Limited Access Case Study},
	url = {https://dx.doi.org/10.4135/9781526477170},
	pages = {205--222},
	booktitle = {The {SAGE} Handbook of Propaganda},
	publisher = {Sage},
	author = {Sevin, Efe and Ayhan, Kadir Jun and Jang, Won Yong and Lee, Hyelim},
	editor = {Baines, Paul and O’Shaughnessy, Nicholas J. and Snow, Nancy},
	date = {2019},
	note = {Type: Book Section},
}
```
